info.name: Gema Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the Gema event platform API. Includes all endpoints for authentication, events, bookings, payments, reviews, admin panel and more.

exec: // Auto-select appropriate token based on request
// Skip token assignment for routes that don't need auth
// Initialize auth object if it doesn't exist or isn't bearer type
// Fallback to general access token if role-specific token not found

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: User authentication and account management endpoints

request.description: Reset password using token from email
Get paginated list of approved events
Get detailed information about a specific event
Update an existing event (vendor only, own events)
Delete an event (vendor only, own events)

item.name: 📚 Collections
item.description: Collection management endpoints for curated content

request.description: Get paginated list of all active collections
Get detailed information about a specific collection with populated events

request.description: Add an event to a collection (admin only)
Remove an event from a collection (admin only)
Get detailed system health status including database connectivity
Search across events, categories, and vendors
Advanced search for events with multiple filters
Get search suggestions based on partial query
Initiate a booking process (creates order and holds seats temporarily)
Get Stripe publishable key and configuration
Create a Stripe payment intent for an order
Stripe webhook endpoint (for testing webhook events)
Get reviews with filtering and pagination
Get reviews for a specific event, vendor, or venue

body.raw:
{
    "type": "event",
    "targetId": "EVENT_ID_HERE",
    "rating": 5,
    "title": "Amazing experience!",
    "comment": "The concert was absolutely fantastic. Great venue, excellent sound quality, and the performers were outstanding.",
    "pros": [
        "Excellent sound quality",
        "Great venue",
        "Professional organization"
    ],
    "cons": [
        "Parking was a bit challenging"
    ],
    "orderId": "ORDER_ID_HERE",
    "media": [
        "https://example.com/review-image1.jpg"
    ]
}

request.description: Update an existing review (own reviews only)
Vote on whether a review is helpful
Respond to a review (vendor only, for their events)
Get paginated list of all users with filtering
Get detailed user information by ID
Get all events for admin review

item.description: Comprehensive analytics and business intelligence endpoints

request.description: Get high-level platform metrics and KPIs
Get detailed revenue analytics and trends

query.description: User segment: all, new, returning, premium

request.description: Get user engagement and behavior analytics
Get event performance metrics and trends

query.description: Ranking metric: revenue, bookings, views, ratings
Number of top events to return

request.description: Get top performing events by various metrics

query.description: Sort by: revenue, events, bookings, ratings

request.description: Get vendor performance analytics and rankings
Export analytics report in various formats
Get ticket details and QR code
Get list of venues with filtering

item.name: 📤 File Upload & Media Management
item.description: Comprehensive file upload and media management endpoints with Cloudinary integration

formdata.description: Category: event, profile, venue, blog, etc.
Image quality: auto, high, medium, low

request.description: Upload a single image with Cloudinary optimization
Upload user avatar with automatic cropping and optimization
Get Cloudinary upload signature for client-side uploads
Delete an uploaded file (own files only)
Get detailed file information and metadata
Generate a shareable link with expiration

item.name: ✅ Check-in System
item.description: Event check-in and attendance tracking endpoints

request.description: Check-in to an event using ticket
Get specific blog post by slug
Share a blog post on social media
Get current user's coupon usage history
